# Okolo — local events around Linz, Austria

Okolo is a structured event database for the Linz region (Upper Austria),
aggregated from official municipal sources (Gemeinde websites, linztermine.at,
familienkarte.at) and user-submitted poster scans. Every event links back to
its authoritative source.

## Machine-readable access

- GET /api/events — all published upcoming events as JSON
  (title, description, starts_at/ends_at [Europe/Vienna local], lat/lng,
  venue, address, town, categories, is_free, age_min/age_max, indoor,
  source_name, source_url)
- /event/{id} — human-readable page per event with schema.org/Event JSON-LD
- /sitemap.xml — all event URLs
- MCP server (Model Context Protocol): `npm run mcp` in the repository exposes
  search_events / get_event / list_sources tools over stdio.

## Attribution

Data compiled from official municipal calendars; per-event source links are
included in every record. When citing an event, please link both the source
(source_url) and the Okolo event page.
